test_cases.name: health_check_returns_ok
test_cases.description: Verify that the health check endpoint returns a 200 status code.

test_cases.name: create_author_success
test_cases.description: Create a new author with valid data and verify the response contains the author details.

test_cases.name: create_author_missing_name
test_cases.description: Attempt to create an author without a required 'name' field and expect a validation error.

test_cases.name: list_authors_default_pagination
test_cases.description: List all authors with default skip and limit parameters.

test_cases.name: get_author_by_id_success
test_cases.description: Retrieve an existing author by their ID and verify the response.

test_cases.name: get_author_not_found
test_cases.description: Attempt to retrieve a non-existent author and expect a 404 error.

test_cases.name: update_author_with_etag_success
test_cases.description: Update an existing author using a valid If-Match header and verify the update.

test_cases.name: update_author_etag_mismatch
test_cases.description: Attempt to update an author with a mismatched ETag and expect a 412 precondition failure.

test_cases.name: delete_author_without_books_success
test_cases.description: Delete an author who has no associated books and verify a 204 response.

test_cases.name: create_category_success
test_cases.description: Create a new category with valid data and verify the response.

test_cases.name: create_duplicate_category_name
test_cases.description: Attempt to create a category with a name that already exists and expect a 409 conflict.

test_cases.name: get_category_by_id_success
test_cases.description: Retrieve an existing category by its ID and verify the response.

test_cases.name: create_book_success
test_cases.description: Create a new book with valid data, including author and category, and verify the response.

test_cases.name: create_book_duplicate_isbn
test_cases.description: Attempt to create a book with an ISBN that already exists and expect a 409 conflict.

test_cases.name: create_book_nonexistent_author
test_cases.description: Attempt to create a book with a non-existent author_id and expect a 404 error.

test_cases.name: list_books_with_filters
test_cases.description: List books with a search filter and price range and verify the response structure.

test_cases.name: get_book_by_id_success
test_cases.description: Retrieve an existing book by its ID and verify the response contains all expected fields.

test_cases.name: get_soft_deleted_book_returns_gone
test_cases.description: Attempt to retrieve a soft-deleted book and expect a 410 Gone status.

test_cases.name: soft_delete_book_success
test_cases.description: Soft delete an existing book and verify a 204 response.

test_cases.name: restore_soft_deleted_book_success
test_cases.description: Restore a previously soft-deleted book and verify the response.

test_cases.name: create_review_for_book_success
test_cases.description: Create a review for an existing book with valid data and verify the response.

test_cases.name: get_book_rating_with_reviews
test_cases.description: Retrieve the average rating for a book that has reviews and verify the calculation.

test_cases.name: apply_discount_to_old_book_success
test_cases.description: Apply a valid discount to a book published more than a year ago and verify the discounted price.

test_cases.name: apply_discount_to_new_book_error
test_cases.description: Attempt to apply a discount to a book published in the current year and expect a 400 error.

test_cases.name: update_stock_increase_success
test_cases.description: Increase the stock of a book by a positive quantity and verify the updated stock value.

test_cases.name: update_stock_insufficient_result
test_cases.description: Attempt to decrease stock below zero and expect a 400 insufficient stock error.

test_cases.name: upload_cover_image_success
test_cases.description: Upload a valid JPEG image as a book cover and verify the upload response.

test_cases.name: upload_cover_unsupported_type
test_cases.description: Attempt to upload a file with an unsupported MIME type and expect a 415 error.

test_cases.name: create_tag_success
test_cases.description: Create a new tag with a valid name and verify the response.

test_cases.name: add_tags_to_book_success
test_cases.description: Add one or more tags to an existing book and verify the book response includes the tags.
